_meta.purpose: UT-TDD V-model 4 artifact + 8 directed edge runtime state template (PLAN-002 W2).
_meta._superseded: ADR-001 (2026-05-27): 旧 L1-L4 + L3.5/L3.8/L6 層・G1-G4/G3.8 は requirements_v1.2 で L0-L14 + W-model (pair=G1/G3/G4/G5/G6, trace=G7) に再定義。Python (coverage.py/pytest) も TS (vitest) へ。本 template は TS vmodel 実装時に L0-L14 で再生成する。
_meta.note: JSON does not support comments. Underscore-prefixed top-level keys are metadata; consumers must read 'plan_id' / 'layers' / 'freeze_status' / 'edges' / 'pair_freezes' / 'l6_qa' / 'inverted_pyramid'.
ut_tdd_adapt: vendor (HELIX V2) の planning/architecture/detailed/functional/impl 5 layer + 30 D-* deliverable を捨て、
UT-TDD §2.1 の 4 artifact (design/impl/test_design/test_code) と §2.2 の 3 段階 freeze (Pair / Red / Trace) に再構築。
vendor の score_formula は §2.7 受入条件 (4 artifact 揃い + 8 edge pass + coverage >=80%) に置換。

inverted_pyramid._note: P0 if design+impl exist but test_design+test_code missing; P1 if test_code only is missing.

coverage._carry: TS vmodel 実装で coverage (vitest c8/istanbul) integration を実装 (旧 PLAN-002-b は superseded)

g3_8_red_freeze._carry: TS vmodel 実装で vitest collection + 失敗理由分類 (未実装 vs 構文エラー) を実装 (旧 PLAN-002-c は superseded)
